10.reason: [Missing space in format string causes incorrect parsing of input with spaces; should be "%d %c" to skip whitespace]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Missing space in format string causes incorrect parsing of input with spaces; should be "%d %c" to skip whitespace]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.5 , reason:  [scanf format "%d%c" does not skip whitespace, so it may read space characters as operators, causing incorrect parsing]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.5 , reason:  [Missing space in format string causes incorrect parsing of input with spaces; should be "%d %c" to skip whitespace]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.5 , reason:  [Missing space in format string causes incorrect parsing of operator following number due to whitespace handling; should be "%d %c" to skip whitespace]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.5 , reason:  [Missing space in format string causes incorrect parsing of operator when input has spaces; should be "%d %c"]

12.reason: [Same issue: missing space in format string "%d%c" fails to handle spaces between number and operator]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Same issue: missing space in format string "%d%c" fails to handle spaces between number and operator]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.5 , reason:  [same issue: "%d%c" reads the next character immediately after the number, which could be a space, leading to wrong operator detection]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.5 , reason:  [Same issue: missing space in format string "%d%c" fails to handle spaces between number and operator]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.5 , reason:  [Same issue: missing space in format string "%d%c" may read newline or space as operator instead of skipping whitespace]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.5 , reason:  [Missing space in format string causes incorrect parsing of next operator when input has spaces; should be "%d %c"]
